---
title: "Najiyah's Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://bit.ly/info550" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">DATA 550 website</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>A Jekyll website I built for previous iterations of this class.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>
<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/allicodi/vaxstrat" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">vaxstrat R package</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>An R package for computing principal effects quantifying vaccine impact on post-infection endpoints.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>
